mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN SUBSTR(MAX(APPROVAL_ID), 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(MAX(APPROVAL_ID)) + 1) ELSE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '101' END AS APPROVAL_ID FROM FWK_SETTLEMENT WHERE APPROVAL_ID LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_SETTLEMENT ( APPROVAL_ID, APPROVAL_NAME, APPROVAL_DESC, PRESENTER, FINAL_MANAGER, APPROVAL_REQ_TIME, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{approvalId}, #{approvalName}, #{approvalDesc}, #{presenter}, #{finalManager}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{presenter} )
